turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Booking a table at a restaurant 🗨️

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hi, I’d like to book a table for two tonight.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! What time would you like to come in tonight?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I would like to go around 6 p.m. if it's okay.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, 6 p.m. works fine. Would you prefer to sit indoors or outside on the terrace?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Perfect! How’s the weather there? Would you say the terrace has a nice vibe tonight?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yeah, it’s a lovely evening—mild breeze and clear skies. The terrace has a great atmosphere right now. Would you like me to reserve a table out there for you?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great! I’ll reserve a terrace table for two at 6 p.m. tonight. Could I have your name for the booking, please?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Under the name of Natalia Cardona

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, Natalia. Your table for two on the terrace at 6 p.m. is all set. Would you like me to note any special requests—like a birthday, dietary preference, or seating preference?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yeah, it's my friend's birthday, and she's vegetarian, actually

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, thanks for letting me know! We’ll make sure there are good vegetarian options and a little birthday touch for your friend. Would you like us to bring out a small dessert with a candle after your meal?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: That would be great , thank you.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, we’ll arrange that for you. Everything’s confirmed for tonight at 6 p.m.—terrace table for two, vegetarian-friendly menu, and a birthday dessert. See you this evening, Natalia!

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re very welcome, Natalia. See you tonight—enjoy the celebration!
